title: SuiteCRM
description: Open-source customer relationship management for sales, marketing and service teams: accounts, contacts, leads, opportunities, cases and workflows.
installation: Runs the Bitnami SuiteCRM image (bitnami/suitecrm). SuiteCRM only supports MariaDB/MySQL (no PostgreSQL) — this template ships the bundled mariadb addon (default db/user/password 'suitecrm', rotate before production). On first boot the admin account is provisioned from SUITECRM_USERNAME / SUITECRM_PASSWORD / SUITECRM_EMAIL — rotate SUITECRM_PASSWORD (placeholder value) and the mariadb password to match SUITECRM_DATABASE_PASSWORD. The valkey addon is wired as the optional Redis cache/session store via SUITECRM_REDIS_HOST (Valkey is Redis-compatible and password-less here); remove it if not wanted. SUITECRM_HOST is set from the app URL token so generated links resolve. Persistent app data (uploads, custom modules, config) lives at /bitnami/suitecrm — back this up. For outbound email configure SMTP from the SuiteCRM admin UI after install. Scheduler/cron jobs should be run via an external CronJob hitting cron.php.
